buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-6
cards.interactive: rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

code_editor.name: @monaco-editor/react
code_editor.usage: Essential for the coding interface. Configure with 'vs-dark' theme and 'verilog' language support.

waveform.name: wavedrom
waveform.usage: Use 'wavedrom' or a simple SVG implementation for digital signal visualization if needed. Prioritize VCD download functionality first.

charts.name: recharts
charts.usage: Use for dashboard statistics (submissions, pass rates, difficulty distribution).

icons.name: lucide-react
icons.usage: Primary icon set. Use for UI elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI with the provided color palette (Dark Mode default).
2. Install '@monaco-editor/react' for the code editor component.
3. Create a 'ProblemLayout' with a resizable split-pane (using 'react-resizable-panels' or standard CSS flex). Left: Markdown Description, Right: Monaco Editor.
4. Implement the 'WaveformViewer' as a placeholder or simple SVG renderer if 'wavedrom' is too complex to integrate quickly, but ensure 'Download VCD' button is prominent.
5. Use 'recharts' for the User Dashboard analytics.
6. Ensure all API calls are mocked or connected to the FastAPI backend as per the 'problem_statement'.
7. Authentication pages must be clean, centered cards with glassmorphism effects.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, excessive gradients).
Use deep, rich dark backgrounds (#09090B) instead of pure black.
Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA).
Add micro-interactions (hover, focus, active states) to all buttons and inputs.
